sections.subtitle: Team Form
sections.text: Lille has shown strong form in their last 5 matches, securing 3 wins, 1 draw, and 1 loss, with an impressive attacking output led by Jonathan David. Stade de Reims, however, is struggling, with no wins in their last 3 matches and failing to score in those games, indicating a lack of offensive threat.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In the last two head-to-head encounters, Lille has dominated Stade de Reims, winning both matches (2-0 and 1-0) without conceding a goal. This suggests Lille holds a psychological and tactical edge over Reims in recent meetings.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Lille ranks 5th in the league with 57 points, boasting a strong defense (2nd least goals conceded) and decent attack (8th in goals scored). Stade de Reims, positioned 14th with 33 points, struggles offensively and defensively, which could hinder their chances in this matchup.

sections.subtitle: Key Players and Absences
sections.text: Lille's Jonathan David (16 goals) and Benjamin André (high form rating) will be crucial, though they miss some key defenders. Reims lacks Keito Nakamura (11 goals), severely impacting their attack, while Junya Ito remains their primary threat.
